title: Telemedicine | Piel en Armonia
description: Remote dermatology route with triage, escalation criteria, and clinical continuity.
heading: Dermatology Telemedicine
lead: Remote consultation works when it increases diagnostic clarity and lowers decision friction.

blocks.title: How it works
items: You share background information and clinical photos with context.
Medical priority and remote resolution probability are defined.
Initial plan, prescription when needed, and review timing are set.
Risk signals trigger immediate in-person escalation.

initiatives.title: Visual triage
initiatives.copy: Early classification with contextual clinical images to prioritize risk.

initiatives.title: Flare control
initiatives.copy: Remote follow-up for inflammatory cases with response-based adjustments.

initiatives.title: In-clinic escalation
initiatives.copy: Referral to the clinic when warning signs appear or procedures are required.

initiatives.title: Quito continuity
initiatives.copy: Clinical sequencing for patients in Quito with remote review and in-person care when needed.

bookingStatus.title: Transactional schedule in update
bookingStatus.description: Booking form and payment return in the next V6 phase. Medical guidance and triage criteria remain active now.
